sliced_spec.name: Consumer Discretionary Weekly Google Trends Surge

entry_exit.entry: Enter position if weekly search interest for 'shopping' increases by at least 15% week-over-week
entry_exit.exit: Exit position after 3 weeks or when search interest reverts below 5% increase week-over-week

trigger.condition: weekly search interest for 'shopping' increases by at least 15% week-over-week
